description_long: This is a vintage, cylindrical bottle with a dark, weathered exterior and a narrow neck topped by a slightly deformed cap. The bottle features two large, aged paper labels: one with blue and orange print reading 'Stephens Blue Black Writing Fluid,' and another with detailed product information in black text. The surface shows signs of rust, patina, and wear, suggesting it is made of metal, likely tin or steel, and has been exposed to the elements for some time. The cap appears to be an integral part of the bottle, possibly crimped or pressed on, and is visibly dented and corroded. The overall appearance is utilitarian and industrial, with a distinctly historical or antique character. The bottle is opaque, and there is no visible indication of liquid inside.
description: A vintage, dark metal bottle with aged paper labels and a dented, corroded cap. The surface is weathered, with visible rust and patina, giving it an antique appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing a large, faded label with black text and some rust and patina on the bottle's surface.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main label with 'Stephens Blue Black Writing Fluid' in blue and orange, and the most prominent signs of wear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with partial label visibility and more exposed, dark, corroded metal surface.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting a detailed product information label in black text and the bottle's overall cylindrical shape.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large paper labels with 'Stephens Blue Black Writing Fluid' in blue and orange, and detailed product information in black text. Labels are aged, faded, and cover much of the bottle's surface.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Visible dents, corrosion, rust, patina, and label discoloration and wear.
